visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top, stands in a brightly lit Costco refrigerated section. She holds a large, transparent plastic package containing a "Northeast Sauerkraut Pork Pot". She looks directly into the camera, speaking expressively while pointing at the product. The background shows rows of various pre-packaged meat and seafood products under bright studio-like lighting. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of the raw ingredients inside the container: vacuum-sealed clams, thinly sliced pork belly, several varieties of meatballs, fresh mushrooms, and a large bag of golden sauerkraut. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the textures of the fresh food. (3) Back to the woman at Costco, she continues her energetic presentation, gesturing towards the refrigerated shelf behind her where more products are displayed. The camera uses a medium-shot distance, capturing her upper body and the surrounding supermarket environment. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen. A close-up shows a hand using a patterned towel to lift a heavy blue ceramic pot lid. As the lid rises, steam billows out, revealing the cooked hot pot with bubbling broth and various ingredients. (5) The primary woman is joined by another woman wearing a hat and a similar brown top. They are seated at a wooden table in a home setting, enthusiastically eating from small bowls with chopsticks. They show high arousal through wide eyes, smiles, and thumbs-up gestures as they taste the food. (6) Detailed close-ups of specific cooked items are shown, such as a bouncy fish ball and tender meat slices held by chopsticks. The women continue their animated conversation, nodding and gesturing with their hands to emphasize their enjoyment of the meal.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 號稱好市多. [Variety]: 好吃了. (2) [Subtitle]: 員工必買商品之一. [Subtitle]: 東北酸菜白肉鍋. (3) [Subtitle]: 1公斤只要255元. (4) [Subtitle]: 聽說這個真的很好吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後每一年都會有. [Subtitle]: 這一次的變. (6) [Subtitle]: 以前是台灣豬. [Subtitle]: 然後他的丸子也會更換一下. (7) [Subtitle]: 我們來看下今年的值不值得. (8) [Subtitle]: 就代表他料給的很實在. [Subtitle]: 成本壓得很重哦. (9) [Subtitle]: 好吃好吃. [Variety]: 真的好好吃. (10) [Subtitle]: 果然是好市多員工必買推薦. (11) [Subtitle]: 他的東西. [Variety]: 誠意. (12) [Subtitle]: 首先他的寬粉給的量真的很少. (13) [Subtitle]: 可是真的是吸飽了. [Subtitle]: 那整個湯汁. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後他東北酸菜鍋的. [Variety]: 酸菜是非常的酸. (15) [Subtitle]: 然後白菜的甘甜是有的是. (16) [Subtitle]: 這個湯頭你自己再拿來配白飯. [Subtitle]: 或者再煮冬粉都綽綽有餘. (17) [Subtitle]: 因為真的很濃郁. (18) [Subtitle]: 最重要是他的魚蛋. [Variety]: 彈到不行. (19) [Subtitle]: 在你嘴巴跳舞. [Variety]: 超級Q彈. (20) [Subtitle]: 不敢相信這是自帶的火鍋料哎. (21) [Subtitle]: 然后這伊比利豬肉片也是給的分量. (22) [Subtitle]: 非常的誠意. [Subtitle]: 你也不會覺得太油. (23) [Subtitle]: 因為配著這個湯頭簡直完美. [Variety]: 簡直完美. (24) [Subtitle]: 酸白菜的量足夠你煮第二餐. (25) [Subtitle]: 難怪血本下血本. [Subtitle]: 這一大鍋只要500元. (26) [Subtitle]: 真的是非常划算. [Subtitle]: 4人份絕對能吃飽.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing in the Costco scene and the home dining scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a brown off-the-shoulder top; the other has black hair and wears a grey hat and a brown top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a bright Costco refrigerated section with stainless steel shelves and packaged food. Later, it moves to a cozy indoor living room/dining area with a wooden table and warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic female narrator begins speaking with high vocal arousal and a bright, friendly tone. Her speech rate is moderately fast with clear articulation. In the background, an upbeat, high-tempo electronic-pop BGM with a strong, rhythmic beat plays at a moderate volume. The sound is studio-clean with a high signal-to-noise ratio. (2) As the visuals cut to ingredient close-ups, the narration continues with consistent pitch variability, describing the components of the dish. The music remains steady, providing a sense of momentum. (3) A sharp "whoosh" sound effect marks the transition to the kitchen scene. This is followed by a distinct metallic scraping and clinking sound as the pot lid is lifted, accompanied by the gentle, broadband hiss of escaping steam and a soft bubbling broth sound. (4) The audio texture shifts to include live reaction sounds. Two female voices are heard talking excitedly, with frequent high-pitched exclamations and overlapping speech. The BGM remains present but slightly ducked under the voices. (5) Several post-production sound effects are introduced, including "ding" and "sparkle" sounds to emphasize visual highlights. The women's voices exhibit high valence and arousal, indicated by laughter and rhythmic hand-slapping on the table. (6) The video concludes with the narrator's voice returning to a more direct, summarizing tone. The BGM swells slightly before a clean hard cut at the end. The overall dynamic range is compressed for a standard social media broadcast feel.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Intro -> Preparation -> Taste Test -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to recommend the 'Northeast Sauerkraut Pork Pot' from Costco by demonstrating its value, rich ingredients, and authentic taste through a real-life tasting experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase with specific pricing and enthusiastic verbal recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media food recommendation video with high editing density and expressive host performance.
